news.title: Auto review: Road trippin' in the Infiniti QX80 Sport mega-ute
news.snippet: INDIANAPOLIS — It's construction season in the Midwest, and there’s no better way to navigate it than in a mega-ute. Not in a sedan (WHUMP! Those road seams are harsh). Not in a compact SUV (YIKES! Those semis are huge!)....

news.title: Palo Alto Weekly honored with 35 awards in statewide journalism contest
news.snippet: The Palo Alto Weekly received 35 awards this week in the annual California Journalism Awards contest, including top honors in the categories of breaking news, transportation reporting, faith reporting and page design.

news.title: Elon Musk agrees with Tim Cook: The memory shortage is unprecedented
news.snippet: Elon Musk said soaring memory costs are the "biggest price jump in anything I've ever seen" and that the solution is "MUCH higher production."
